subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Jinab-i-Áqá Mírzá Ḥusayn Ḥáḍir, upon him be the Glory of God, the All-Glorious [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات الله جناب آقا میرزا حسین حاضرند علیه بهاء الله الابهی و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
